narration: Nothing escapes a black hole — except the truth about how they work.

narration: Black holes are regions where gravity is so strong, not even light can escape.
visual_description: Context visual: Black holes are regions where gravity is so strong, not even light can escape.

narration: They form when massive stars collapse, creating an event horizon — the point of no return.
visual_description: Escalation visual: They form when massive stars collapse, creating an event horizon — the point of no return.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: They form when massive stars collapse, creating an event horizon — the point of no return.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: They form when massive stars collapse, creating an event horizon — the point of no return.

narration: Inside, gravity distorts spacetime, creating bizarre effects. Imagine time slowing down.
